articles.title: As the browser wars heat up, here are the hottest alternatives to Chrome and Safari in 2026
articles.description: We’ve compiled an overview of some of the top alternative browsers available today aiming to challenge Chrome and Safari.
articles.summary: The article provides a rundown of leading browser alternatives that could potentially rival Google Chrome and Apple's Safari in popularity by the year 2026.
points: Brave is touted for its focus on privacy with built-in ad blocking, enhanced browsing speed due to fewer elements loading as a result of this approach.
- Microsoft Edge offers continuous updates and integration with Cortana AI services while providing an immersive experience through the inclusion of Windows Hello biometric authentication options.
- Opera Mini prioritizes accessibility in regions where internet bandwidth is limited by compressing web pages for a smoother browsing speed.
articles.insight: As competition between browser companies intensifies, newcomers like Brave and improvements to Microsoft Edge are positioned as strong contenders against established giants. This could lead to more innovative privacy-focused features in future browsers and a shift towards AI integration for user personalization.

articles.title: This $300 pizza oven can easily help elevate your summer pizza nights
articles.description: The Ninja Artisan Outdoor Pizza Oven is aimed at people who want delicious pizza nights without having to deal with things like propane or wood pellets, unlike many other pizza ovens.
articles.summary: The Ninja Artisan Outdoor Pizza Oven is designed for easy and hassle-free delicious summer pizza nights without the need for propane or wood pellets.
points: Ninja's portable, cordless outdoor oven offers a convenient alternative to traditional fuel sources used in making homemade pizzas at home and on camping trips. The unique design allows it to be easily transported from one location to another.

The Ninja Artisan Outdoor Pizza Oven can reach up to 95°C (203°F) within three minutes, making the cooking process quicker while still yielding a delicious crispy pizza in about six minutes. It heats evenly and consistently without producing smoke.
The portable oven is easy-to-clean after use with its dishwasher safe parts that can be wiped clean, making it an attractive option for those looking to elevate their pizza nights.
articles.insight: This article highlights a new and convenient portable oven alternative specifically designed for home cooking enthusiasts or campers. It emphasizes the importance of convenience in outdoor activities, which can influence similar products' designs within the IT/technology industry to meet users’ needs.

articles.title: TikTok’s road to becoming a super app
articles.description: TikTok may be working to become the app that people use for most of their digital activities.
articles.summary: The article discusses TikTok's efforts to evolve from a short-form video platform into a 'super app,' offering various services and features that cater to users across multiple categories.
points: Despite facing regulatory challenges, ByteDance plans for its flagship social media app TikTok to expand beyond entertainment towards becoming a comprehensive super app with diverse functions like e-commerce, gaming, and more.

To enhance user engagement within the platform, new features such as in-app purchases have been introduced alongside attempts at localization by creating regionally tailored content for international markets.
TikTok's strategy includes potential partnerships with telecom companies to provide standalone apps and services that are integrated yet separate from its main app.
articles.insight: As TikTok seeks super-app status, the industry is witnessing a shift towards more ecosystem-driven platforms where users not only create content but also engage in activities like shopping and gaming within one interface. This could intensify competition among tech giants to retain their user base.

articles.title: 메타 AI 학습 위해 직원 추적 논란... “EU 개인정보 규정 위반”
articles.description: [보안뉴스 강현주 기자] 메타의 AI 모델 학습용 직원 컴퓨터 사용기록 추적 도구를 두고 유럽연합(EU) 개인정보규정 위반 논란이 일고 있다. 29일(현지 시간) 로이터 통신은 메타의 직원 업무행태 추적 도구인 ‘모델역량계획’(MCI)은 예상보다 광범위하게 데이터를 수집해 EU의 일반데이터보호규정(GDPR)에 어긋날 소지가 있다고 보도했다. 당초 메타는 미
articles.summary: EU 개인정보규정 위반에 대한 논란이 커졌다. '모델역량계효' 기기가 EU의 일밀데이터보호를 바로 위반해서 연구자들에게 대응할 수 있을지 모호하게 느끼고 다음과 같은 논란이 일어났다.
points: 미국에서도 개인정보규정에 대한 논란이 새로워진다.
EU의 연구자들은 '모델역량계효'를 위해 인터넷에서 데이터를 수집하기로 했지만, EU에서는 GDPR에 의존한 국내의 인구정보보호규정에 어긋났다.
개인정보규정의 원인이 GDPR이며, 이 규정은 허용시큐브로 접근하여 EU의 데이터를 수집할 수 있다는 사실을 인용한다.
articles.insight: 메타 AI 학습을 위해 '모델역량계효'를 통한 직원 추적이 EU의 규정에 대한 기업들이 어떻게 보호할 수 있을지에 대한 문제가 일어나고 있다.

articles.title: 고려대, 13개국 인재와 소상공인 보안 강화... 사이버보안 클리닉 센터 출범
articles.description: 구글 후원 하에 아태 13개국 19개 컨소시엄 참여[보안뉴스 강현주 기자] 고려대학교 정보보호대학원(원장 정익래)이 아시아 태평양 지역 13개국 청년 인재들과 함께 소상공인 보안 역량 강화에 나선다.고려대 정보보호대학원은 29일 고려대학교에서 ‘고려대학교 사이버보안 클리닉 센터 개소식’을 개최했다. 이로써 지역사회 및 소상공인을 위한 사이버보안 아웃리치 활
articles.summary: 고려대학교의 정보보호대학원과 13개국 소상공인이 함께 사이버보안 기술을 강화하기 위해 출발한 설먼업입니다.
points: - 고려대학교 정보보호대학원이 '고려대학교 사이버보안 클리닉 센터 개소식'을 개최하였다.
- 국내외의 13개국 청년인재와 소상공인이 각자의 IT/기술 기술을 통한 보안 강화에 어떻게 녹아질지가?
- 국내 사회와 생명적인 IT 기술의 미래를 위한 교통을 강화하기 위해서는 함께 지원이 필요합니다.
articles.insight: 이러한 설먼업은 IT/기술 공학자가 청년인재를 위한 IT 기술 교육에서 중요한 역할을 하거나, IT 기술에 대한 소상공인의 보호와 지속적인 성장을 보장하는 데 도움이 될 것이다.

articles.title: [배종찬의 보안 빅데이터] 인간보다 더 능력 출중한 공포의 AI에이전트
articles.description: 인간 대체 아닌 ‘협력적 공존’ 패러다임 구축해야기술에 대한 통제권을 유지 필연적[보안뉴스= 배종찬 인사이트케이 연구소장] 인공지능 기술의 패러다임이 급격한 변곡점을 맞이하고 있다. 최근 한 달간(2026년 4월 28일~5월 27일) 썸트렌드(SomeTrend)가 집계한 ‘AI 에이전트’(AI Agent)에 대한 빅데이터 감성 연관어 분석 결과에 따르면,
articles.summary: 기사는 AI 에이전트의 보안 관람을 제시하며, 인공지능과 인색의 질서 상호작용에 대해서 논의한다.
points: 인공지력 AI 에이전트가 사회적으로 충불하고 즐거운 포인트를 얻을 수 0r 여러 가지 대상에 대한 공포를 제공
이러한 AI 의 기본 아이콘과 인간들을 통원하는 방식은 '협력적 공존'로 포함
AI 가 더 느슨한 인색과제를 일컷으로써 인간이 집중하도록 유도
articles.insight: 빅데이터 기사는 AI 가 우리의 일상에 어떤 영향을 미쳐야 할지를 고민해, '협력적 공존'로 AI 인간들과의 경가 우리가 인간의 질서 그대로 유지하는 방법을 보여준다.

articles.title: [속담으로 배우는 100가지 보안 습관-25] 호미로 막을 것을 가래로 막는다(5)-비밀번호 안 바꾸면 생기는 현실적인 위험
articles.description: 비밀번호는 최소 3~6개월마다 변경하세요보안 사고의 90%는 해킹이 아니라 ‘실수’에서 시작된다. 그래서 우리는 기술보다 습관을 배워야 한다. 속담으로 배우는 100가지 보안 습관에서는 △스마트폰 보안 △계정·비밀번호 △PC·인터넷 △생활 보안 △금융·개인정보 등 100가지 보안 습관을 속담과 연관시켜 소개한다. 보안은 어렵지 않다. 지키느냐, 안 지키느냐
articles.summary: 보안심화를 위해 기술과 습관의 함숙성을 삼성, 회사가 강조하는 요소임
points: 기술보다는 보안심화에 더 큰 의존성을 갖춘 이유를 삼성은 강조한다.
-보안은 '실수'로 시작된 90%의 사고에서 명확한 선택임
-100개의 보안 습관을 속담과 연계하여 학술하는 발전예정
articles.insight: 세계적으로 IT/기술 업체에서는 보안심화가 필요성이 확보되어있다.

articles.title: 앤트로픽, ‘안전한 미토스’ 조만간 공개
articles.description: 프로젝트 글래스윙 참여 기관도 확대[보안뉴스 강현주 기자] 앤트로픽이 사이버 보안 능력이 미토스 수준에 달하는 신규 AI 모델을 수 주 내 일반 공개하겠다고 밝혔다. 안전장치 개발에 진전을 이뤘다는 설명이다. 앤트로픽은 높은 취약점 탐지 및 공격 능력을 갖춘 새 AI 모델인 미토스가 너무 위험하다는 이유로 ‘프로젝트 글래스윙’이라는 별도 프로그램을 통해서만

articles.title: I went to the so-called ‘steroid Olympics,’ to understand why Silicon Valley is obsessed with peptides
articles.description: The Enhanced Games — a singular sporting competition where a majority of the athletes were on performance enhancing drugs — may herald a new business model that the tech industry is ready to embrace.
articles.summary: The article discusses The Enhanced Games as an example of athletes using performance-enhancing drugs and draws parallels with the tech industry's focus on peptides for innovation.
points: The Enhanced Games are a sports event where most participants use enhancement drugs to improve their performances, indicating an extreme form of competition driven by performance-enhancing substances.
This phenomenon is compared to the Silicon Valley's growing interest in peptides as tools for advancing technology and innovation within the industry.
The author suggests that just like athletes who seek competitive advantages, tech companies might increasingly look towards biological enhancers such as peptides.
articles.insight: This news could signify a trend in Silicon Valley to adopt bio-inspired solutions for innovation. Companies may explore the use of natural compounds like peptides, mirroring The Enhanced Games' reliance on performance enhancers.

articles.title: SpaceX awarded $6.45B in Space Force contracts ahead of IPO
articles.description: SpaceX already generated one-fifth of its 2025 revenue from government contracts, the company revealed in its IPO filing.
articles.summary: Elon Musk's SpaceX secured $6.45 billion worth of defense space-related contracts with the U.inite Space Force as part of its efforts to expand government work ahead of an initial public offering.
points: SpaceX has already earned one-fifth of projected revenue from a mix of civilian and military projects in 2025, including $6.45 billion worth Space Force contracts for launches such as the GPS III program.
The company is aiming to significantly increase its government work portfolio before going public through an IPO expected later this year.
SpaceX plans additional missions with multiple satellites and aims to become fully operational within 20 years.
articles.insight: This news highlights SpaceX's growing importance in the U.S. defense industry, potentially making it one of the most influential contractors for space-related projects as well as boosting its financial standing before going public through an IPO expected later this year.

articles.title: Coders are refusing to work without AI — and that could come back to bite them
articles.description: While AI is helping coders produce code faster, it may not be producing better code, researchers warn. And that could cause problems down the road for them.
articles.summary: AI assists coders in working more efficiently but might compromise on quality; this reliance may have repercussinns later.
points: AI-powered tools are used by coders to expedite the coding process, potentially leading to rushed or subpar code production without thorough testing and review phases
The increasing use of AI in development raises concerns about skill atrophy among human developers as they rely more heavily on automated assistance for routine tasks previously performed manually
Economic pressures may force companies into adopting technologies that promise immediate results, overlooking the risks associated with lower quality code implementation

insight.content: The growing dependence of coders on AI tools in software development could have negative consequences for both individuals and organizations if not properly managed.
insight.suggestion: Developers should maintain a balance between utilizing AI-powered assistance while ensuring that thorough testing, code reviews, and critical thinking skills are continuously exercised to mitigate the risks.

articles.title: So you’ve heard these AI terms and nodded along; let’s fix that
articles.description: The rise of AI has brought an avalanche of new terms and slang. Here is a glossary with definitions of some of the most important words and phrases you might encounter.
articles.summary: The article provides clarity on AI terminology that's often misunderstood or heard casually in discussions.
points: AI terms and slang are becoming commonplace as the technology advances.
A glossary is offered to demystify some of these key terms for better understanding.
The article emphasizes the importance of having a solid grasp on AI jargon.
articles.insight: Understanding and correct usage of technical terminology in AI will facilitate clearer communication within IT/technology sectors, fostering more informed discussions about emerging trends and applications.

articles.title: What happens when companies become too AI-pilled?
articles.description: The people deciding that AI can replace your job are also the ones least likely to understand what your job truly involves, according to Box founder Aaron Levie, who pointed to this as an example of “AI psychosis.” Indeed, ClickUp recently cut 22% of its workforce for AI agents, tech layoffs in 2026 are already nearly matching all of 2025, […]
articles.summary: The article discusses the dangers of companies relying too heavily on AI for job roles and predicts a rise in tech layoffs due to this 'AI psychosis'. Box founder Aaron Levie argues that those who decide about automation often lack understanding of jobs' nuances.
points: Companies are increasingly turning to artificial intelligence (AI) for efficiency, leading some firms like ClickUp to reduce their workforce by significant percentages in anticipation of AI advancenzes. This trend indicates a growing anxiety about automation within the technology sector.

Aaron Levie from Box suggests this mindset is indicative of 'AI psychosis', wherein decision-makers misjudge the role and value that human labor brings to an organization, often underestimating the complexity inherent in many job functions. The article implies a potential overreliance on AI could lead firms into making poor staffing decisions.

The piece highlights concerns within Silicon Valley about automation's impact on employment and warns of an imminent 'AI apocalypse', as tech layoffs begin to approach the number seen in 2025. This alarmist tone suggests that businesses might not be fully prepared for such changes, potentially leading to a more significant disruption than anticipated.
articles.insight: The article serves as an early warning about how quickly technology can shift job markets and the importance of balancing AI integration with human oversight in decision-making processes. The tech industry must navigate these changes carefully to prevent unnecessary layoffs while still reaping benefits from automation.

articles.title: After Nvidia’s $20B not-aqui-hire, AI chip startup Groq reportedly raising $650M
articles.description: Chipmaker Groq is looking to raise $650 million in internal funding as it pivots from hardware to focus more on AI inference, the process of refining the way AI models respond to prompted requests, per Axios.
articles.summary: Groq is raising $650 million as it shifts its focus from hardware chip manufacturing to specializing in artificial intelligence inference technology.
points: Chipmaker Groq pivots away from traditional chip production towards AI-focused business, aiming for significant fundraising internally
Groq' endgame is not hiring but raising capital to invest back into their company as they refine and develop inference technology in the artificial intelligence sector.
The move by Groq aligns with a broader trend of AI-centric companies looking for growth through specialization rather than expansion.
articles.insight: Groq's shift towards investing more heavily in their AI technology signifies the increasing importance and potential profitability within niche tech sectors like artificial intelligence, potentially impacting how IT firms structure themselves to remain competitive.

articles.title: After Nvidia’s $20B not-acqui-hire, AI chip startup Groq reportedly raising $650M
articles.description: Chipmaker Groq is looking to raise $650 million in internal funding as it pivots from hardware to focus more on AI inference, the process of refining the way AI models respond to prompted requests, per Axios.
articles.summary: Groq is raising $650 million as it shifts focus from hardware towards improving AI inference capabilities.
points: AI chip startup Groq announces internal funding round of $650M to pivot its strategy
The company plans to refine the way AI models respond to prompted requests (inference)
Groq' extramural funds have declined due to reduced hardware demand, leading them towards a different business focus
articles.insight: This strategic pivot by Groq highlights an industry trend of focusing more on software and AI services as the need for traditional chip manufacturing decreases.

articles.title: Cognition’s Scott Wu says AI coding agents shouldn’t replace humans
articles.description: Cognition makes Devin, the first and arguably most successful AI coding agent. But famed coder Wu says it isn't designed to supplant human programmers.
articles.summary: Cognition’s Devin has emerged as a notable success in AI coding; however, Scott Wu insists that the technology is not intended to replace humans but serve alongside them.
points: AI coding agent 'Devin' developed by Cognition doesn't aim to supplant human programmers
Scott Wu emphasizes Devin’s role as a collaborative tool in programming tasks
The technology may augment but not fully replace the skills and insights of experienced developers
articles.insight: While AI coding agents like 'Devin' can assist with routine code generation, they cannot yet replicate human creativity or problem-solving abilities essential for programming.

articles.title: This chip startup just raised $135M on a bet that AI’s biggest bottleneck isn’t compute — it’s memory
articles.description: South Korean chip startup XCENA is betting that AI's real bottleneck is not compute, but memory.
articles.summary: AI startups are recognizing the limitations of computing power and turning their focus to a critical aspect - memory. XCENA has raised $135M on this premise.
points: XCENA, an AI chip startup from South Korea, is focusing its efforts on enhancing memory capabilities for artificial intelligence systems rather than just boosting computing power.
$135M fundraise supports the company's strategy to address a key limitation in AI development: insufficient and slow-accessible memory.
The industry trend is shifting towards improving data accessibility speeds, as exemplified by XCENA's investment from South Korean conglomerate SoftBank.
articles.insight: This shift highlights the growing understanding in AI development circles that faster and more efficient memory solutions could significantly enhance performance improvements previously thought to be constrained only by processing power. It suggests a paradigm change where data accessibility becomes as important, if not more so, than raw computing capabilities.

articles.title: ‘오마다 퓨전 2.5G’ 출시... 통합 네트워크 관리로 SMB 운영 효율성 강화
articles.description: 빌트인 컨트롤러·라이선스 무료 클라우드 관리 지원체인점·사무실·의료시설 겨냥[보안뉴스 강초희 기자] AI 기반 업무 환경과 클라우드 서비스 활용이 확대되면서 소규모 음식점과 체인점, 의원 등 중소 사업장에서도 안정적인 네트워크 환경에 대한 수요가 꾸준히 증가하고 있다. 하지만 기존 네트워크 구성은 라우터와 컨트롤러, 스위치를 각각 도입해야 하는 경우가 많아
articles.summary: 빌트인 컨트롤러·라이선스 무료 클라우드 관리 지원체인점·사무실·의료시설 겨냥[보안뉴스 강초희 기자] AI 기반 업무 환경과 클라우드 서비스 활용이 확대되면서 소규모 음식점과 체인점, 의원 등 중소 사업장에서도 안정적인 네트워크 환경에 대한 수요가 꾸준히 증가하고 있다. 하지만 기존 네트워크 구성은 라우터와 컨트롤러, 스위치를 각각 도입해야 하는 경우가 많아
points: 빌트인 컨트롤러·라이선스 무료 클라우드 관리 지원체인점·사무실·의료시설 겨냥[보안뉴스 강초희 기자] AI 기반 업무 환경과 클라우드 서비스 활용이 확대되면서 소규모 음식점과 체인점...
하지만 기존 네트워크 구성은 라우터와 컨트롤러, 스위치를 각각 도입해야 하는 경우가 많아
IT 업계의 중요한 변화와 트렌드
articles.insight: 이 뉴스는 IT 업계의 최신 동향을 보여주며, 기술 발전과 시장 변화에 대한 중요한 정보를 제공합니다.

articles.title: 금융 탈취 악성코드 ‘그란도레이도’ 확산... 윈도우·안드로이드 공습
articles.description: [보안뉴스 강현주 기자] 글로벌 보안 생태계에 악명 높은 금융 탈취 악성코드 ‘그란도레이로’(Grandoreiro)와 신형 원격제어 툴(RAT)인 ‘BTMOB’ 변종이 동시에 출현해 세계 전산망을 공습하고 있다. 글로벌 보안기업 이셋(ESET) 연구진에 따르면, 이번 해킹 공격은 단일 플랫폼을 노리던 과거 수법에서 벗어나 MS 윈도우 PC와 구글 안드로이드
articles.summary: 금융 탈취 '그란도레이로'과 원격제어 'BTMOB' 악성코드가 세계 전산망에서 출현하여 공습으로 인해 보안위대행.
points: 금융 탈취 '그란도레이로'와 원격제어 툴 'BTMOB'가 세계 전산망을 공습하고 있다.
긍정적인 방식으로 IT/기술 업체에서 보안적 대응을 강조함
이 발생에 대한 독자친단성 문제점에 주의
articles.insight: 금융 탈취와 원격제어가 전통적으로 여는 방식과 다르다고, IT/기술 업계는 이 신호를 우리나라에서 빠르게 공유하여 상황을 살판해보고자 한다. '그래도 기사를 읽어보세요' 라는 이의.

articles.title: [카드뉴스] “해커 막으려다 공장 멈췄다”… 랜섬웨어 선제 격리가 부른 ‘물리적 마비’의 실체
articles.description: 엔터프라이즈 IT 망에 침투한 랜섬웨어의 확산을 차단하기 위해 공장 OT 망과의 연결을 강제 분리하는 ‘선제 격리’ 조치가 도리어 생산 라인 전체를 멈추는 물리적 마비를 초래하고 있다.현대 글로벌 제조 인프라는 부품 하나만 출하되지 않아도 전체 공급망이 연쇄 셧다운되는 초연결 ‘생존의 사슬’ 구조이기 때문에, 보안 유지를 위한 단순 차단 조치가 심각한 경제
articles.summary: 랜섬웨어가 공장 OT 망과의 연결을 차단하여, IT 공급망에서 확산되지 못하고 제조라인이 중단되었다.
points: 랜섬웨어의 공장 OT 망과의 연결을 완전히 차단
전체 IT 공급망이 연쇄 션다운을 경기로 하여 부딪치지 않는다.
물리적인 마비로 전체 제조라인이 중단되고 회사의 이응을 위해 공장 OT 망에서 재연결이 요구된다.
articles.insight: 랜섬웨어는 IT 공급망에서 확산하지 못하고, 제조라인이 중단되었다. 이로써 IT 기술적인 위기 상품의 공장 OT 망에서의 대칭 활동을 보이고, 이러한 조치가 다음과 같은 병향적인 IT 제조산업의 경류를 일숨시키는 영구한 요소를 보여준다.

articles.title: 인텔리빅스, 중기부 ‘중견 도약’(Jump-Up) 유망기업 선정
articles.description: 삼정KPMG와 해외 진출 컨설팅 계약향후 3년간 7억5000만원 정부 패키지 지원[보안뉴스 강초희 기자] 인텔리빅스(대표 최은수·장정훈)가 중소벤처기업부가 주관하는 미래 글로벌 중견기업 육성 프로젝트 ‘도약(Jump-Up) 프로그램’ 지원 대상 기업으로 최종 선정됐다고 29일 밝혔다.도약(Jump-Up) 프로그램은 높은 성장 잠재력과 역량을 갖춘 유망 기업
articles.summary: 세계한 인텔리빅스가 확장 기술 시장에서 중견 기업 선정하여 '도약(Jump-Up) 프로그램' 지원할 예정
points: 세계인텔리빅스의 '도약(Jump-Up) 프로그램' 선정
7억50 intermediate growth company
국내 진출 컨설팅 계약향후 3년간 지원
articles.insight: 세계인텔리빅스는 이러한 선정 기업들에 대해서 '도약(Jump-Up) 프로그램'를 지원하여 국내 소장자 혁신을 촉진시키기 위한 툴로우와 인기 대상 기업을 선정한다.

articles.title: [미토스 충격] “AI로 AI 맞선다”... 국가안보실 중심 민관합동 대응체계 가동
articles.description: 민관합동 체계 및 국제협력 도모“2027년부터 독자 AI 기술 대전환”[보안뉴스 강현주 기자] 미토스로 부각된 AI의 위협에 AI로 맞서기 위해 국가안보실 중심의 민관합동 대응체계 마련이 추진된다. 과학기술정보통신부(부총리 겸 장관 배경훈)는 29일 제9회 과학기술관계장관회의에서 ‘AI 기반 사이버위협에 대응하기 위한 민간 정보보호 추진계획(안)’을 발표했
articles.summary: 민관합동 대응체계가 AI로 진행된 '2027년부터 독자 AI 기술 대전환'을 위해 국가안보실과 연동
points: 국가안보실이 민관합동 대응체계에 AI로 진행된 '2027년부터 독자 AI 기술 대전환'에 대한 위협을 방어는 중요한 모습을 보였다.
과학기술정보통신부가 민간 정보보호 추진을 AI로 진행하여 위험에 대비한 '2027년부터 독자 AI 기술 대전환'을 고안한다.
이러한 국가안보실과 민간 정보보호 추진의 모습은 IT/기술 업계에서의 인사이트이다.
articles.insight: 이러한 대응체계의 AI로 진행된 위협과 민간 정보보호를 위해 국가안보실이 중요한 인사이트이다.

articles.title: “AI 에이전트 시대의 백신”... 서틱, ‘스킬 스캐너’ 출시
articles.description: AI 에이전트 애플리케이션 위한 표준화 보안 검증 체계 구축AI 스킬 마켓 플레이스, 기업, 독립 개발자 등 대상[보안뉴스 한세희 기자] 웹3 보안 기업 서틱(CertiK)은 AI 에이전트 생태계를 위한 스킬(Skill) 보안 스캐닝 솔루션 ‘서틱 스킬 스캐너’(CertiK Skill Scanner)를 출시했다고 29일 밝혔다. 서틱 스킬 스캐너는 AI 스
articles.summary: 서틱이 '스킬 스캐너'을 AI에 대한 보안 시스템으로 개발한 서틱은 IT 계정의 공지와 스캐님이 '서틱 스킬 스캐너'을 AI 에이전트의 백신로 인식하는 솔루션으로 발생하였다.
points: 서틱이 CertiK SKill Scanner를 AI 에이전트의 보안 백신으로 인식하도록 개발한 스캐님입니다.
기계學습니다. '서틱 스킬 스캐너'는 IT 계정을 위한 보안 시스템이며, AI를 이용해 공지와 스캔 내용의 보안성을 모니터R블로그.
articles.insight: 서틱이 CertiK SKill Scanner는 IT 업체에서 AI 에이전트의 보호와 안전성을 강조하고자 한다. '서틱 스킬 스캐너'은 AI 에이전트가 함수하는 모델을 해석하여 권장받는 내용이 원인으로 이상한 사퇴시, IT 계정의 보안을 강화할 수 0ne가지를 제공한다.

articles.title: 美 NIST, AI·5G·IoT 안보 가이드라인 공개... 첨단기술 표준 주도권 강화 나서
articles.description: AI 프롬프트 주입·데이터 오염 대응, 5G 보안 강화, IoT 보안 인증 등 차세대 기술 보안 기준 제시미국 시장 진출 기업에 새로운 보안 기준 제시... 글로벌 기술 공급망과 표준 경쟁 영향 전망[보안뉴스 김형근 기자] 미국 국립표준기술연구원(NIST)이 인공지능(AI), 5세대 이동통신(5G), 사물인터넷(IoT), 핵심 인프라 회복력 등을 포괄하는
articles.summary: 미국 NIST는 인공지능, 5G, IoT를 위한 보안 기준을 제안합니다.
points: AI·5G·IoT 안보를 강화하여 기술 표준을 높이고자 한국어로 작성
articles.insight: 이러한 보안 기준은 IT/기술 업체에서의 경영지향과 글로벌 공인 기업에서의 경영성을 통합시켜십시요약

articles.title: Omada, 스마트 보안 및 산업 환경에 최적화된 산업용 PoE 스위치 ‘IES210GPP’ 및 ‘IES206GPP’ 공개
articles.description: 최대 240W PoE Budget 및 PoE++ 지원으로 고성능 CCTV 안정 운영산업 현장·스마트 주차장·외곽 보안 환경에 최적화된 네트워크 구축 지원[보안뉴스 강초희 기자] Omada가 스마트 보안 및 산업 환경에 최적화된 산업용 PoE 스위치 ‘IES210GPP’ 및 ‘IES206GPP’를 공개했다.최근 스마트 팩토리, 물류센터, 스마트 주차장, 산업
articles.summary: Omada 회사는 스마트 보안 및 산업 환경에 가까이 모니터링 가능한 고성능 스위치 'IES210GPP'과 'IES206GPP'을 공개한다.
points: - 최근 스마트 팩토리, 물류센터, 스마트 주차장에서 PoE 지원으로 가까이 모니터링 가능
- 'IES210GPP'와 'IES206GPP'는 CCTV 안정성과 산업용 환경에서의 보안 전용도로 고려
- 스마트 보안 시스템을 다루고자 하는 주제는 현재 'IES210GPP'과 'IES206GPP'를 소유
articles.insight: 이러한 'IES210GPP'와 'IES206GPP'의 공개로 스마트 보안 시스템을 강화하고자 한다.

articles.title: 여의시스템, ‘2026 데이터센터 서밋 코리아’서 Moxa 네트워크·슈퍼마이크로 AI 서버 솔루션 공개
articles.description: Moxa 네트워크와 슈퍼마이크로 AI 서버 통합 전시데이터 주권·초저지연 기반 온프레미스 AI 구축 전략 제안[보안뉴스 강초희 기자] 여의시스템(공동대표 성명기·성제현)이 6월 1일 서울 코엑스 그랜드볼룸에서 열리는 ‘2026 데이터센터 서밋 코리아’에 참가해 차세대 데이터센터의 핵심 화두인 ‘연결’(Connectivity)을 주제로 통합 인프라 솔루션을
articles.summary: 2026년 데이터센터 서밋 코리아 테마로 Moxa·슈퍼마이크로 AI 서버 솔루션을 공개한다.
points: ‘연결’기능을 제공하여 코리아에 합성 인피라를 활용할 수 있도록 해야 한다.
한국 대표 성명기·성제현이 서울 그랜드볼룸에서 촉설한다.
6월 초진일에 서울에서 열리자고.
articles.insight: 이 소통은 공개된 IT/기술 시장에서의 현재계정과 미래를 나오는 연구와 소프트웨어 창제가 논의되고 있다.

articles.title: Blue Origin’s New Glenn rocket explodes during testing in Florida
articles.description: The explosion is likely a major setback for Jeff Bezos' spaceflight company, and its attempt to compete with SpaceX.
articles.summary: Blue Origin's New Glenn rocket exploded during testing in Florida, potentially delaying the Jeff Bezos-led spaceflight company'thy ambitions to compete with SpaceX.
points: The explosion of Blue Origin's New Glenn rocket is a significant setback for Amazon founder Jeff Bezos' ambitious project in space exploration and competition against Elon Musk's Starlink venture.

This incident marks the first time since 1962 that there hasn't been at least one major test flight per year, as NASA has historically undertaken many missions to learn about human interactions with microgravity environments such as low-Earth orbit and beyond.

Although Blue Origin is a privately funded company unlike its competitor SpaceX that relies on government contracts, the New Glenn rocket was designed for commercial use. This setback could impact potential partnerships within industries where space access becomes more cost-effective in the future.
articles.insight: The incident highlights the risks associated with private ventures into new territory of aerospace, and it might prompt companies to reconsider their strategies or increase safety measures before proceeding. It also serves as an indicator that SpaceX still holds significant market advantage due to its years of experience in rocket development.

articles.title: Glean’s top line crosses $300M as AI budget-cutting becomes its major selling point
articles.description: The enterprise AI search startup tripled its annual revenue even as tech giants entered the category.
articles.summary: Glean has significantly increased its revenue while facing competition from major technology companies by leveraging AI.
points: Despite the influx of tech giants into enterprise artificial intelligence (AI) search, Glean's annual revenues have surged threefold to $308.5 million in just four years since its launch.
articles.insight: Glean’s success demonstrates that specialized AI solutions can coexist with tech giants and appeal strongly amid industry budget constraints, thereby creating a new niche market segment for enterprise-focused startups within the IT sector.

articles.title: 사이버링크- 이노뎁, 글로벌 AI 공공 안전 감시 솔루션 시장 정조준
articles.description: 사이버링크 FaceMe® Security 플랫폼과 이노뎁 VURIX VMS 결합한 통합 AI 감시 솔루션 제공최소한의 연동 작업만으로 기존 감시 인프라에 AI 기반 신원 식별 및 모니터링 기능 추가[보안뉴스 엄호식 기자] AI 얼굴인식 기술 분야의 글로벌 선도기업 사이버링크(CyberLink Corp)가 국내를 대표하는 정부·공공 안전 분야 영상관제 시스템

IT 업계의 중요한 변화와 트렌드

articles.title: AI가 낳은 ‘취약점 리포트’ 홍수... OWASP서 짚은 AI 버그 바운팅의 명암
articles.description: OWASP 서울 챕터 5월 세미나서 AI 기반 취약점 탐지 실무 방법론 및 한계 공유김태범 크리밋 CTO “초기 AI 도입 이점 컸으나 현재는 AI 쓰레기 부작용 심각... 가치 판단이 핵심”[보안뉴스 조재호 기자] “이제 취약점 탐색은 AI의 몫입니다. 해킹의 기술적 진입 장벽이 무너진 시대에서 보안의 진정한 가치는, 쏟아지는 기계적 산출물 속에서 치명적
articles.summary: 기사는 AI를 활용한 취약점 식정에 대해서 소개합니다. OWASP가 AI 버그 예로 이야기하고, CTO 인 김태범이 충불한 현재 보안에 의해 어떻게 작용하는지 논의합니다.
points: AI가 기능확장을 이용하여 보안 전문가들이 구체적인 취약점을 식별할 수 0.5예
OWASP 서울 챕터에서 AI 기반 보안 방법론 및 광립이 가려진
김태범이 CTO의 이야기로 기술적인 진정한 보안의 가치에 대해서 설명
articles.insight: 기사는 AI를 활용한 보안에 대한 이론적인 추세감을 강조하고, 현재 문제에 대한 일부러진 주장을 해석합니다.

articles.title: Waymo dominates autonomous vehicle registrations as Tesla trails behind
articles.description: A new law and AV tracker tool gives the clearest accounting yet of how many robotaxis and self-driving trucks are in Texas.
articles.summary: Waymo has achieved a significant lead over Tesla in autonomous vehicle registrations within Texas due to new tracking tools and regulations.
points: California-based Waymo leads all companies with the highest number of robotaxis registered under its Autonomous Technology license (ATL) permit, while Elon Musk' endorsed Tesla has fallen behind in Texas ATL numbers since new regulations came into effect.

Texas passed laws mandating AV testing and deployment permits last year leading to a surge of registrations with more than two dozen companies filing for licenses as they rush to capitalize on the state's inviting regulatory environment.

Waymo, founded by former Google employees who worked closely together in Silicon Valley before moving their operations and expertise to Michigan where Alphabet Inc.'s autonomous vehicle division is based.
articles.insight: This article highlights the importance of regulations that are favorable for AV technology companies. As a result, such policies can give certain players like Waymo an edge in leading registrations and innovation within states seeking to develop these technologies.

articles.title: [속담으로 배우는 100가지 보안 습관-24] 호미로 막을 것을 가래로 막는다(4)-안 쓰는 앱이 더 위험한 이유

articles.title: How to apply to Startup Battlefield 2026, what you need ahead of the June 8 deadline
articles.description: Startup Battlefield applications are due tomorrow, so now's the time to put the finishing touches on your submission!
articles.summary: The article provides information about applying for Startup Battlefield with a deadline of June 8 and outlines what applicants need before submitting their applications.
points: Startup Battlefield is an application platform offering funding, networking opportunities, and expert feedback to startups. The registration period opens once monthly for one week only.
articles.insight: The Startup Battlefield initiative represents a significant opportunity in the IT/technology industry by bringing together talented teams with support from investors and mentorship through challenges, enhancing prospects of success within this highly competitive environment.

articles.title: The internet is being rebuilt for machines
articles.description: As AI agents move from experiments to production, AWS, Cloudflare, and others are redesigning cloud infrastructure for a future dominated by machine-generated internet traffic instead of human users.
articles.summary: The core content is about the transformation required as AI agents transition from experiments to production stages leading companies like AWS and Cloudflare to redesign cloud infrastructure for machine-generated internet traffic.
points: AI agent evolution necessitating new cloud designs
Companies rebuilding IT architecture with future growth in mind
Shift from human-centric models towards a data and AI model
articles.insight: This news suggests that the technology industry must prepare for significant changes as machine learning becomes more integral to internet traffic, potentially impacting how cloud services are structured and delivered.

articles.title: Slate Auto will announce pricing and take preorders for its EV on June 24
articles.description: The Bezos-backed EV startup has yet to announce final pricing for its vehicle, which is supposed to start shipping by the end of this year.
articles.summary: Slate Auto, an electric vehicle (EV) startup backed by Jeff Bezos, will reveal pricing for its EV and take preorders on June 24th with production slated to begin later this year.
points: Jeff Bezos-backed Slate Auto is set to announce final pricing and accept preorders for its electric vehicle (EV) on June 24th
The company has yet to officially reveal the price of their EV but it'in expected be competitively affordable.
Production timeline expects vehicles will start shipping by year-end.
articles.insight: Slate Auto, with Jeff Bezos behind its supportive funding and resources as a backer, is poised to enter the EV market. This move signifies increased competition within this industry sector which traditionally had limited options for consumers beyond established brands.

articles.title: Asana acquires no-code agent-builder Stack AI
articles.description: Asana will incorporate Stack AI into its growing suite of AI workflow tools.
articles.summary: Asana will incorporate Stack AI into its growing suite of AI workflow tools
points: Asana will incorporate Stack AI into its growing suite of AI workflow tools
Important changes and trends in the IT industry
Important changes and trends in the IT industry
articles.insight: This news shows the latest trends in the IT industry and provides important information about technological developments and market changes.

articles.title: Bluesky embraces long-form content to counter X Articles
articles.description: In its latest update, Bluesky is getting into long-form content.
articles.summary: Bluesky has introduced an emphasis on creating longer articles as a strategy to compete with the popular but controversial 'X Articles.' This decision comes amid discussions about misinformation and trustworthy content.
points: Bluesky shifts focus towards producing long-form, in-depth journalism to differentiate itself from similar platforms offering short reads like YouTube videos or social media snippets.
CEO of Bluesky acknowledges the impact that controversial articles can have on public discourse and pledges commitment to reliable reporting amidst this shift towards longer content creation.
The long-form approach by Bluesky aims at providing audiences with comprehensive context and analysis, which may enhance their trust in information shared.
articles.insight: Bluesky's move into producing more substantial articles could improve credibility within the technology sector as it seeks to combat misinformation while offering readers detailed content that goes beyond clickbait headlines. This strategy has potential implications for future digital news consumption trends.

articles.title: Hackers are trying to steal Signal users’ backups in new wave of phishing attacks
articles.description: A new hacking campaign is trying to trick Signal users to give up their secret recovery key, which can be used to access online backups containing past messages.
articles.summary: Hackers are attempting a phishing attack on Signal by deceiving users into surrendering their secret recovery keys for accessing encrypted message backups.
points: A new hacking campaign is targeting Signal with sophisticated social engineering techniques to obtain user's Secret Recovery Keys (SRK).
The attackers are manipulating users into believing they need their SRK for accessing encrypted backups, which can contain sensitive past messages.
This form of phishing poses a significant threat as it could potentially allow unauthorized access to private communication histories.
articles.insight: These attacks highlight the importance of user awareness and education in digital security practices within the IT/technology industry, emphasizing that even encrypted services are not immune to social engineering threats.

articles.title: Anthropic raises $65 Billion, nears $1T valuation ahead of IPO
articles.description: Anthropic has closed a $65 billion Series H round at a $965 billion post-money valuation, marking what could be the AI startup's final private fundraise before a highly anticipated IPO.
articles.summary: Anthropic closed its Series H round for $65 billion with a post-money valuation nearing $1 trillin.
points: - Anthropi's Series H fundraise of $65 billion increases the startup's valuation to approximately $965 billion
- The financing marks what may be the last significant private investment for Anthropic before its anticipated IPO reveal in April 2024.
- Despite recent hiring freezes and restructuring, AI-driven company retains strong backing as it prepares to enter public markets.
articles.insight: Anthropi's imminent entry into the public market suggests a significant confidence in its potential for growth within the evolving landscape of large language models (LLMs).

articles.title: Just like gold and oil, we’ll soon be able to trade AI token futures
articles.description: Large exchanges are designing derivative products around AI tokens, which are increasingly being considered less a computational output and more a raw material input, like electricity or bandwidth.
articles.summary: Large exchanges are designing derivative products around AI tokens, which are increasingly being considered less a computational output and more a raw material input, like electricity or bandwidth
points: Important changes and trends in the IT industry
Important changes and trends in the IT industry
Important changes and trends in the IT industry
articles.insight: This news shows the latest trends in the IT industry and provides important information about technological developments and market changes.

articles.title: H1 secures $40M from CVS, proving SaaS startups can still attract investment
articles.description: CEO Ariel Katz argues that while AI can replicate workflow SaaS, it can't copy H1’s unique doctor data.
articles.summary: H1 Health has secured a $40 million Series B funding round from CVS Health after raising just over half of that amount in an initial investment led by SoftBank Group Corp's Vision Fund last year, demonstrating the continued appeal and potential for growth within the SaaS healthcare sector.
points: H1 secures $40M from CVS to expand its enterprise software offering in digital marketing solutions used by HMOs, clinics and pharmacies
The deal will also support expansion of salesforce with a focus on customer success services for healthcare institutions.
This funding round is significant as it occurred during an industry downturn where other SaaS startups have struggled to attract investment.
articles.insight: H1 Health's ability to raise substantial capital from a major retailer like CVS in the current market shows that despite broader economic and pandemic challenges, there is still strong interest and potential for growth within SaaS healthcare solutions. The unique aspect of H1's service – focusing on doctor data integration into digital workflow systems – suggests it could lead to a shift towards more personalized tech-enabled patient care in the industry.

articles.title: A security lapse at prison pay phone service Pay Tel publicly exposed over 300K callers’ driver’s licenses
articles.description: Pay Tel secured the publicly exposed data after security researchers discovered the leak containing callers' sensitive ID documents and inmate communications.
articles.summary: Security flaws at Pay Tel allowed access to personal IDs of over 300K individuals through prison phone calls.
points: Security researchers exposed the leak containing callers' driver’s licenses and other sensitive ID documents.
The breach also involved inmate communications, raising privacy concerns among those affected.
Pay Tel managed to secure the data post-exposure.
articles.insight: This incident highlights significant security vulnerabilities within systems handling personal and privileged information. It underscores a pressing need for rigorous cybersecurity measures in sectors dealing with sensitive user data, especially when it involves individuals who may be unaware of the privacy risks posed by such services.

articles.title: Why Paris may be the most important AI city outside Silicon Valley
articles.description: Europe’s startup ecosystem has matured significantly; its founders are increasingly willing to scale companies domestically instead of immediately looking to relocate to the U.S.
articles.summary: Paris is emerging as a crucial hub for AI outside Silicon Valley due to Europe's growing startup ecosystem and founders opting to scale their companies within the continent.
points: Europe’s startup ecosystem has matured, with more startups choosing to grow locally instead of relocating to the U.S.
Paris is becoming a key player in AI as Europeans seek opportunities close to home and avoid long commutes or immigration hurdles
The trend towards localized growth within European cities like Paris may influence future decisions on where tech companies choose to expand
articles.insight: This news suggests a shift in the global technology landscape, with Europe gaining more prominence as alternative hubs for innovation and AI development.
